statusLine.command: python -c "import sys,json,os; d=json.load(sys.stdin); m=d.get('model',{}).get('display_name','claude'); c=os.path.basename(d.get('workspace',{}).get('current_dir','') or ''); cost=d.get('cost',{}).get('total_cost_usd',0); print(f'[{m}] {c} | ${cost:.4f}')" 2>/dev/null || echo claude

hooks.command: python -c "import sys,json; cmd=json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''); import re; danger=re.search(r'(rm\s+-rf\s+/|rm\s+-rf\s+\*|git\s+push\s+.*--force.*(main|master)|git\s+reset\s+--hard|DROP\s+(TABLE|DATABASE)|:\(\)\{)', cmd); print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput':{'hookEventName':'PreToolUse','permissionDecision':'ask','permissionDecisionReason':'Potentially destructive command detected — please confirm'}}) if danger else '{}')"

python -c "import sys,json,datetime,os; d=json.load(sys.stdin); ti=d.get('tool_input',{}); tr=d.get('tool_response',{}); fp=ti.get('file_path') or (tr.get('filePath') if isinstance(tr,dict) else '') or ''; line=f'{datetime.datetime.now().isoformat()}\t{d.get(\"tool_name\",\"\")}\t{fp}\n'; p='.claude/edit-log.txt'; lines=open(p,'r',encoding='utf-8').readlines() if os.path.exists(p) else []; lines.append(line); lines = lines[-400:] if len(lines) > 500 else lines; open(p,'w',encoding='utf-8').writelines(lines)" 2>/dev/null || true

BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo 'not a git repo'); LAST=$(git log -1 --oneline 2>/dev/null || echo 'none'); printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"Git branch: %s | Last commit: %s"}}' "$BRANCH" "$LAST"
